lineage.Process: CalculateField working_pa_polygons URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField working_pa_polygons URB_RURAL "Rural Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField Working_MUSA_Composite URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField Working_MUSA_Composite URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField Working_MUSA_Composite LONG_NOTES "2,200 Acres: 75% Res" VB #
CalculateField working_pa_polygons URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #

CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #

CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #

CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive THRIVE_PA "Emerging Suburban Edge" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (PA)" COMDESNAME "Urban Core - Core City" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (PA)" COMDESNAME "Urban Center - Core City" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (PA)" LONG_NOTES "Corrected erroneous Community Designation July 20, 2015 to community and Council agreed Thrive designation during 2014." VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive URB_RURAL "Urban Planning Areas" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (PA)" COMDESNAME "Urban Center - Core City" VB #

CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (PA)" LONG_NOTES ""Ammendment adds land to OAA. City of Carver wants area in Community Designation. No planned land use nor sewer. Unique condition." " VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive CPA_ID right( [LONG_NOTES], len( [LONG_NOTES])-4) VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "School is served by sewer service from Oak Park Heights" VB #
CalculateField Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive COCTU_DESC "Hastings (Dakota Co. part)" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "3/27/2019 - ES has agreed to call all of Plymouth in 2020 MUSA" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "3/27/2019 - ES has agreed to call all of Plymouth in 2020 MUSA" VB #

CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "Areas designated as MUSA 2030 yet Staging 2012-2030 with platting and development occurring as of August 2019 are coded as MUSA 2020" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "Plan states 2038 horizon, not 2040" VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "Area annexed into city." VB #
CalculateField "Working_PA_MUSA_Polygons_thrive (MUSA)" LONG_NOTES "SMSC land. SMSC will likely provide sewer. No plan as of Mar2018. Ownership based on 2010 parcels. (Trust Land)" VB #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations temp3 SHORT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations temp4 TEXT # # 40 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations temp5 TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations CTU_ID LONG # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations CTU_NAME TEXT # # 254 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations COMDES2040 SHORT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations COMDESNAME TEXT # # 40 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignations URB_RURAL TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

Append L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation L:\Resources\DatabaseConnections\SDE@GISLibrary.sde\DBO.LandUseAndPlanning\DBO.ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation "Use the Field Map to reconcile schema differences" "COCTU_ID "COCTU_ID" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,COCTU_ID,0,11;COCTU_DESC "COCTU_DESC" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,COCTU_DESC,0,40;CTU_ID "CTU_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,CTU_ID,-1,-1;CTU_NAME "CTU_NAME" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,CTU_NAME,0,254;COMDES2040 "COMDES2040" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,COMDES2040,-1,-1;COMDESNAME "COMDESNAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,COMDESNAME,0,40;URB_RURAL "URB_RURAL" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,L:\Staging\StageForSDE.gdb\ThriveMSP2040CommunityDesignation,URB_RURAL,0,20" # #

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.
